tweets.full_text:
Banks can hit record profits while cutting jobs through higher productivity: AI and automation handle routine tasks (like data processing or compliance), fewer employees generate more revenue per person. 

Add strong markets—trading fees, M&A deals, and higher interest rates boosted net interest income massively in recent years. Headcount reductions often target overlapping roles post-mergers or inefficient legacy ops, not core profit drivers. Efficiency wins.

tweets.full_text:
Manual trading is now obsolete.  

Most traders lose because: 
- They're too slow (miss entries) 
- They're emotional (hold bags for too long) 
- They sleep (miss exits)

 but now @grvt_io has built Grvt Agent Skills: a set of open-source capabilities that let users and AI agents interact with our exchange entirely through natural language.

You set the strategy and AI handles everything else.

but don't be mistaken these aren't basic bots.  

They: 
✅ Execute complex strategies 
✅ Manage your entire portfolio 
✅ Trade 24/7 without emotion 
✅ React faster than any manual trader

This is what separates 2026 traders from 2020 traders.
While others panic-sell at 3am, or FOMO into tops, your AI is waiting for your entry and making sure you don't lose.

$GRVT isn't just a perpdex.

It's a trading operating system.

Still early if you're paying attention. https://t.co/tyMTMdG4zU

@grvt_io
